title: AI Summary Latency Optimization
source_request: AI Summary is taking too much time to load .. make it faster
non_blocking_questions: What p95 and p99 latency targets should define success for AI Summary?
Should optimization prioritize first-load latency, repeat-load latency, or both equally?
Are any quality or freshness trade-offs acceptable to achieve performance goals?

title: API Runtime Env and Docker Hardening
source_request: some times we are getting error for api.fix this error permanently. check env and docker file for permanent fix this issue.fix env issue also . Let me know , need any help.
non_blocking_questions: Which API endpoints fail most often: solve, summary, summary_ui, diagram, or startup itself?
Which runtime reproduces the issue most often: local scripts, Docker local container, or another deployed environment?
Is there an external env source that must remain backward compatible, such as env.ai, .env, compose, or deployment secrets?
